text: THE KNOWLEDGE HUB

text: The project solves everyday library delays
textPreview: The project solves everyday library delays

text: One shared system replaces scattered manual records.
textPreview: One shared system replaces scattered manual records.

text: Find resources faster
textPreview: Find resources faster

text: Students can search titles, view availability and reserve a copy before visiting.
textPreview: Students can search titles, view availability and reserve a copy before visiting.

text: Control circulation
textPreview: Control circulation

text: Librarians issue, return and renew books while the system updates copy counts.
textPreview: Librarians issue, return and renew books while the system updates copy counts.

text: Reduce avoidable penalties
textPreview: Reduce avoidable penalties

text: Return countdowns, overdue status and fine records make deadlines visible.
textPreview: Return countdowns, overdue status and fine records make deadlines visible.

text: THE KNOWLEDGE HUB
textPreview: THE KNOWLEDGE HUB

text: A lightweight web stack fits the problem
textPreview: A lightweight web stack fits the problem

text: The technologies are familiar, fast to develop and practical for a campus demonstration.
textPreview: The technologies are familiar, fast to develop and practical for a campus demonstration.

text: Browser layer
textPreview: Browser layer

text: HTML structures each page, CSS creates the responsive Ghana-inspired design, and JavaScript handles interaction.
textPreview: HTML structures each page, CSS creates the responsive Ghana-inspired design, and JavaScript handles interaction.

text: Application server
textPreview: Application server

text: Node.js and Express expose REST APIs and use one language—JavaScript—across client and server.
textPreview: Node.js and Express expose REST APIs and use one language—JavaScript—across client and server.

text: Data and security
textPreview: Data and security

text: SQLite stores the records; bcrypt hashes passwords; JSON Web Tokens protect authenticated requests.
textPreview: SQLite stores the records; bcrypt hashes passwords; JSON Web Tokens protect authenticated requests.

text: Why this choice?
textPreview: Why this choice?

text: Low setup cost • easy local deployment • rapid development • enough structure to grow into a hosted system
textPreview: Low setup cost • easy local deployment • rapid development • enough structure to grow into a hosted system

text: Login is the secure entry point
textPreview: Login is the secure entry point

text: One form accepts either a username or an institutional email address.
textPreview: One form accepts either a username or an institutional email address.

text: Passwords are checked against bcrypt hashes.
textPreview: Passwords are checked against bcrypt hashes.

text: Successful login returns a signed JWT session.
textPreview: Successful login returns a signed JWT session.

text: The interface changes for student, librarian or admin roles.
textPreview: The interface changes for student, librarian or admin roles.

text: Forgot password starts a verified phone-number flow.
textPreview: Forgot password starts a verified phone-number flow.

text: THE KNOWLEDGE HUB
textPreview: THE KNOWLEDGE HUB

text: Phone verification adds a second proof of identity
textPreview: Phone verification adds a second proof of identity

text: The prototype demonstrates the complete flow before connecting a real SMS provider.
textPreview: The prototype demonstrates the complete flow before connecting a real SMS provider.

text: Register
textPreview: Register

text: Student supplies username, school email and password.
textPreview: Student supplies username, school email and password.

text: Add phone
textPreview: Add phone

text: The system links a Ghana telephone number to the account.
textPreview: The system links a Ghana telephone number to the account.

text: Enter token
textPreview: Enter token

text: Demo code 1234 confirms the registration or reset request.
textPreview: Demo code 1234 confirms the registration or reset request.

text: Continue
textPreview: Continue

text: The account becomes verified and the user can sign in.
textPreview: The account becomes verified and the user can sign in.

text: Production upgrade: replace 1234 with a time-limited code sent by an SMS API, then store only a hashed token and expiry time.
textPreview: Production upgrade: replace 1234 with a time-limited code sent by an SMS API, then store only a hashed token and expiry time.
